subject: Accounting
title: Why Cash Flow Matters
description: Learn Why Cash Flow Matters in one minute.

hook.text: A company reports $5 million profit but can't pay its employees. How? Profit isn't cash.

buildup.text: The income statement shows profit. The cash flow statement shows actual money movement.

discovery.text: Revenue recorded on credit boosts profit but delivers zero cash until the customer pays.

twist.text: Many profitable companies have gone bankrupt simply because they ran out of cash.

climax.text: Experienced investors always check cash flow—it's harder to fake than net income.

punchline.text: Profit is an opinion. Cash is a fact.

quiz.question: Why can a profitable company go bankrupt?
options: It runs out of actual cash
